title: File column: Manually edit version number

posts.author: Jonathan-BookCheck (Jonathan Clayton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Just a product suggestion in respect of the ‘File versioning’ feature of the ‘Files’ column available in the boards:

It would be great if the version numbers could be manually adjusted (perhaps restricted to Admins-only) instead of the automatic “V1,V2,V3… etc.” designations used currently.

We use Monday - in part - as a repository for our quality compliance documentation and when we’re uploading say, a pdf which is “version 8” to us, it would be great to reflect that in the version-designation in Monday for consistency when it comes to the audit trail (rather than having to first upload the 7 preceding versions in order to get us to trigger the ‘V8’ designation).

Hope that makes sense.
